title: PACIFIC 26" Rubber Gloves, Chemical Resistant Gloves PVC Reusable, Heavy Duty Waterproof Gloves with Cotton Liner, Anti-skid, Acid-alkali and Oil, X Large
features: 𝐄𝐱𝐜𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐂𝐡𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐥 𝐑𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞: The ergonomically shaped reusable work gloves are made of PVC, offer high resistance to chemicals, alkali, solvent, and mechanical risks, also can be used a long time at work no fracturing, become hard, oil impregnate and more. And our reusable long rubber gloves are anti-aging and the mechanical strength can be maintained above 90% under continuous operation for 96 hours at 158 degree Fahrenheit.

𝐅𝐥𝐞𝐱𝐢𝐛𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 & 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞: With 13 gauge seamless cotton liner, these heavy duty chemical resistant gloves are breathable, easy to pull on and off. You will be able to wear these chemical resistant gloves for long periods of time without discomfort. The amazing flexibility of these extra long sleeve 26 inches gloves are the most notable feature, provide effective barrier protection for wrist and arm from splashes, abrasives and dangerous chemicals.

𝐒𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐧𝐠, 𝐒𝐮𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐨𝐫 𝐆𝐫𝐢𝐩: The non-slip sandy textured palm chemical resistant gloves offer good grip to grab the wet and greasy parts. They meet the highest level 4 (at least 8000 cycles) of abrasion resistance, level 1 (1.2 index) of blade resistance, level 2 (25 newton) of tear resistance and level 1 (20 newton) of puncture resistance.

𝐌𝐮𝐥𝐭𝐢𝐩𝐮𝐫𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐞: The rubber work gloves are latex free, better solutions for people with sensitive skin. They are ideal for handling chemicals, petrochemical and oil refining, mechanical manufacturing, mining, agriculture, farm, gardening, construction, automotive industry, forestry and more.
𝐑𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧: This chemical gloves are compliant with Intertek and meet CA Prop.65 regulations for phthalates.
description: Product Description PACIFIC PPE Reusable Chemical Resistant Gloves PACIFIC PPE is committed to designing work gloves that protect your hands to keep you safe, especially for those working in the field of chemical protection. Features Sandy Textured Palm Sandy textured palm offer excellent resistance to oil and acid. Seamless cotton liner 13 gauge cotton lining provides a good temperature for both hands, breathable and more comfortable to wear. 100% Liquid Proof PVC long cuff, soft and waterproof, ideal for wet and moisture work place. PVC (Poly Vinyl Chloride) Functional in temperatures ranging from -30˚F (-34˚C) to 212˚F (100˚C). Chemicals Resistant Chemical hazard EN ISO 374-1:2016 is Type B, Tested chemical are Methanol(A), n-Heptane(J), Sodium Hydroxide 40%(K). Superior Grip The non-slip sandy textured palm chemical resistant gloves offer good grip to grab the wet and greasy parts. 26 inches Extra Long These sleeves are up to 26 inches long and use a unique heat sealing sleeve technique to produce. Latex Free & Multipurpose Ideal for handling chemicals, petrochemical and oil refining, mechanical manufacturing and so on. About Us PACIFIC PPE is a sub-brand of LANON Protection Technology Co., Ltd, focusing on PPE. We are committed to creating the most reliable personal protective equipment for workers. We believe workplace safety is vital for business. Our company develops products with innovative technologies and offers them at reasonable prices.
